hooks.name: pre-deploy-full-compliance
hooks.description: SAM/CloudFormation 部署前執行完整合規驗證：憑證 + S3 ACL + PII + Region

steps.command: python -c "import ast, pathlib; errors=[f for f in pathlib.Path('.').glob('*.py') if not ast.parse(f.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))] ; print(f'Syntax OK ({len(list(pathlib.Path(chr(46)).glob(chr(42)+chr(46)+chr(112)+chr(121))))} files)')"

steps.failMessage: 合規檢核未通過，部署被阻止。請先修復所有 FAIL 項目。

steps.command: python -c "import os; r=os.environ.get('AWS_DEFAULT_REGION',''); allowed={'us-east-1','us-west-2'}; print(f'[OK] Region={r}') if r in allowed else (print(f'[FAIL] Region={r!r} 不符合競賽規定'), exit(1))"

python -c "import os; arn=os.environ.get('SAGEMAKER_ROLE_ARN',''); ok=arn.startswith('arn:aws:iam::') and 'ACCOUNT_ID' not in arn; print('[OK] SAGEMAKER_ROLE_ARN set') if ok else print('[WARN] SAGEMAKER_ROLE_ARN 未設定或仍含佔位符')"
